_README: Manually-added highlight links, applied on every build after crawling so they survive even if a broadcaster removes them from its playlist. Add with: node scripts/add-video.mjs <src> <youtube-url> ...  (it resolves the match from the title; pass --match KEY to force one). Each entry: { match (fixture id like B5 or knockout number), src, type (r recap / x extended / g game-in-30), id (11-char YouTube id) }.
